name: Sector YAMA
short_description: Sci-fi military action-rts. Play as a space soldier, abandoned by the command on an alien planet. Find allies, gather resources, train new troops, and escape from Sector Yama. Casual "single-stick shooter" controls, fun tactical combat, rewarding exploration, and rich storytelling.
detailed_description:
Sci-fi action-RTS set on an alien planet at the outskirts of known space.

A previously docile alien species has suddenly begun to attack a newly established human outpost.

Play as one of the conscript soldiers tasked with the guarding of the outpost and try to survive the alien attack and to escape with your life. 

Gather the troops, upgrade your equipment, explore the planet, and find a way to escape!

-= Sector YAMA Features =-

- Command troops in real-time combat with dozens of units on screen

- Explore the map to find new allies, resources, and secrets

- Capture production points

- Destroy enemy bases

- Participate in an epic space-opera story

- Ultra-casual controls - can play with a single gamepad stick!

- Play as Soldier - who was abandoned by the military command on an alien planet and who has to take the command in his own hands to escape the war and save his life

-= Gameplay mechanics  =-

Allied troops will automatically follow the player and attack enemies in range. The player's primary job is to gather a large force of allied troops, and then defeat enemy troops by tactically balancing his own position in a way that protects his allies from harm while also keeping himself alive.

Game length: 3+ hours
